issues.detail: Instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases such as installation failures or missing dictionaries.
The file contains extensive explanatory text that may be considered verbose.
The skill is limited to Linux/macOS environments and does not support Windows.

scenarios.name: Fast scoped scan of a single host with dangerous endpoints excluded
scenarios.rationale: Treatment runs skipfish with -W minimal.wl, -I '^http://host/' to clamp scope, -X to skip /logout and /delete, and -d/-c/-l to time-box, then opens ./report/index.html as documented; baseline reaches for nikto/nmap/zap or runs skipfish without scope flags and risks crawling /logout.

scenarios.name: Authenticated scan using a pre-acquired session cookie
scenarios.rationale: Treatment pre-authenticates via curl, extracts the session value, passes it with -C 'session=...' to skipfish along with -X for the logout endpoint and a fresh -o output dir — exactly the skill's pattern; baseline tries skipfish flags like --auth or a login URL form that the tool does not support.
